layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, cinematic hero, bento grid for services.

components_strategy.navbar: Glassmorphic header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) fixed at the top with a subtle bottom border. Must contain logo, links, and 'Réserver' CTA.
components_strategy.hero: Full-height (min-h-[90vh]) cinematic section. Background image of luxury car at night with a heavy gradient overlay (black to transparent to black). Large heading, subtle subtitle.
components_strategy.booking_form: Floating glassmorphic card placed either inside the hero or immediately below. Use Shadcn inputs with floating labels or dark-themed inputs. Includes: Date picker, Time select, Pickup, Dropoff, Transfer type.
components_strategy.services_bento: Asymmetric bento grid. Trajets Ponctuels & Mise à disposition (col-span-12 md:col-span-6). Transferts Aéroports (tall card, row-span-2 md:col-span-4). Affaires & Événementiel (md:col-span-8). Hover effects with image zoom inside the card.
components_strategy.interactive_map: React Leaflet integration with a dark-mode tile layer (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter) showcasing coverage area or trip route.
components_strategy.why_choose_us: Grid of 3-4 items with Phosphor icons in Gold, minimal text.
components_strategy.testimonials: Clean, border-less cards with a subtle dark metallic texture or just solid #141414. Small gold star ratings.
components_strategy.whatsapp_cta: Fixed bottom-right circular button with WhatsApp icon, pulsing animation, green brand color or gold.
components_strategy.footer: Large padding (py-24). Big typography for brand name. Grid for links. Darker than background_primary if possible (or just #0A0A0A with a top border).

motion.reveals: Framer motion for staggered fade-up on scroll.
motion.hover: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and borders glow slightly (border-white/20). Primary buttons have a subtle scale effect.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup @phosphor-icons/react and lenis for smooth scrolling.
Build the UI in React with Tailwind CSS. This is a dark theme luxury website; strictly avoid pure white backgrounds.
Use Shadcn UI for the Booking Form (Select, DatePicker/Calendar, Popover, Input, Button). Ensure Shadcn components are fully customized to the dark/gold theme. No default light borders.
For the map, use react-leaflet and leaflet with a dark tile provider like: https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png.
Implement the 'Trajets Ponctuels', 'Mise à Disposition', 'Transferts Gares & Aéroports', and 'Affaires & Événementiel' as the primary services using the bento grid strategy.
Include a 'WhatsApp' floating action button for direct contact.
Do NOT use raw HTML `<select>` or `<input type='date'>`. Use Shadcn variants.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
